title: Craftable Loot Chests
description: The Craftable Loot Chests Mod lets players create unique loot chests tailored to materials like iron, gold, and diamonds, offering themed rewards and enchanted items with the use of special Enchant Runes.
body:
![Craftable Loot Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b1ac1ccfd6bce3e94ea43b6b37e6757827dae63.png)
# Mod Info!

Elevate your Minecraft experience with the Craftable Loot Chests Mod! This innovative mod allows players to create their own themed loot chests using specific in-game items. From the enchanting Lapis Chest to the resource-rich Iron Chest, each crafted chest contains a tailored set of items that enhance gameplay and exploration. Perfect for players who love to strategize and personalize their adventures, this mod adds depth and excitement to your Minecraft world. Prepare to craft, explore, and discover with Craftable Loot Chests!

## Features:
Craftable Chests: Create loot chests using materials like iron, gold, diamonds, and more.
Tailored Loot: Each chest type offers rewards specific to the material used in crafting.
Enchant Runes: Use Enchant Runes to unlock enchanted versions of items within the chests.
Cooldown Mechanic: Balanced gameplay with cooldowns for opening chests.
Variety of Chests: Includes Village Chest, Food Chest, Coal Chest, Iron Chest, Gold Chest, Diamond Chest, Netherite Chest, and Lapis Chest.

## Documentation:

### Crafting Recipes:

![Craftable Loot Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7190b3c45bc7ac648ab8e16fde7e13f9b3329680.gif)

### Tailored Loot:

Each chest type offers rewards specific to the material used in crafting.

![Craftable Loot Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e4d2ceeddb54edcde844963fc5d8d99c48b3fa.gif)

### Advancements:
![Craftable Loot Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/171bc8c374e161e6f8c1780cba285fc52dbc1e41.png)

### Enchant Runes:

What is an Enchant Rune? The Enchant Rune is a special item that can be found in Lapis Chests. Using an Enchant Rune on a resource chest allows you to obtain enchanted items from the chest, making your gameplay even more exciting and rewarding.

![Craftable Loot Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7730458076ed77ba1712fadd2701fa84e7e5fcfd_0.webp)

How to Find an Enchant Rune? The Enchant Rune can only be found in Lapis Chests. These chests often contain lapis lazuli and other valuable items related to enchantments.

How to Use an Enchant Rune? Once you've found an Enchant Rune, you can use it on one of the resource chests (such as the Iron Chest, Gold Chest, Diamond Chest, etc.). This will give you access to enchanted versions of the items in these chests.

## Changelog:
### Version 1.0.0:
- Initial release with 8 craftable loot chests and Enchant Rune functionality.
## Mod usage!
 
### Do NOT:
- Re-upload the mod
- Claim ownership of this mod
### DO:
- You can share the location link of the mod
- Report problems
- Give feedback
- Use this mod in modpacks
- Make videos of this mod
### Credits:
Author: Kentime (Project Blue)
